data.description: Moderate uncertainty (Defensive). Geopolitical friction regarding Russia and China is being partially offset by tactical easing of Venezuelan energy sanctions, keeping markets in a wait-and-see posture amid moderate volatility. VIX is 18.00. Focus on rangebound capture or high-conviction catalysts.
data.global_thesis: Geopolitical friction regarding Russia and China is being partially offset by tactical easing of Venezuelan energy sanctions, keeping markets in a wait-and-see posture amid moderate volatility.
